description: A new tenant has signed a lease for a retail space. The property manager must set them up in the system.

nodes.task_description: Abstract the key terms from the fully executed lease agreement (e.g., rent amount, start/end dates, CAM charges, renewal options).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent accurately extracts all critical data points from the lease.

nodes.task_description: Set up the new tenant and their lease terms in the property management software.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly enters all abstracted lease data into the system.

nodes.task_description: Schedule future rent escalations and renewal option deadlines in the system calendar.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent sets up automated reminders for important future dates.
